title: Xtra Crispy Jamaican Yams Skewers
description: A pungent and crispy Jamaican dish featuring molasses, this recipe is perfect for adventurous eaters, Jain-friendly and air-fried to perfection. The combination of spices and molasses creates a unique flavor profile.

ingredients.name: yams
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together molasses, soy sauce, brown sugar, scotch bonnet peppers, garlic, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the yam cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the molasses mixture.
Thread the yam cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the olive oil onto the yam cubes.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each skewer.
Cook the yam skewers for 12 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through.
Increase the air fryer temperature to 420 degrees Fahrenheit and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until crispy.
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and serve hot.
